packageRules.description: Group nerves_system_* bumps. One bump usually triggers a matching nerves_system_br shift, so reviewing them together avoids per-target churn.
Group buildroot-tracked nbpr_X package bumps. These follow Buildroot's pinned package version — the version a user actually gets when source-build runs.

buildroot-package.description: Reads `package/<pkg>/<pkg>.mk` from buildroot/buildroot at the BR_REF pinned in the URL below, base64-decodes the file, and extracts the first `<PKG>_VERSION = <semver>` line. BR_REF is itself tracked by the `nerves-system-br-buildroot-version` datasource — Renovate updates this URL automatically when nerves_system_br/main bumps its NERVES_BR_VERSION pin.

nerves-system-br-buildroot-version.description: Reads nerves_system_br/main's create-build.sh and extracts NERVES_BR_VERSION. Used to keep the BR_REF in this very renovate.json in lockstep with nerves_system_br's pinned Buildroot version. Tracks `main` rather than the latest tag, so it leads pinned releases by some skew — review the resulting PR alongside the nerves_system_* group.

customManagers.description: Workspace @prebuild_systems map → upstream nerves_system_* GitHub releases.
nbpr_jq @version → Buildroot's `JQ_VERSION` line at the pinned BR_REF.

nbpr_dnsmasq @version → Buildroot's `DNSMASQ_VERSION` line. Buildroot ships e.g. `2.91`; the package's @version pads to `2.91.0` for Hex's required semver shape, so the bump PR will need a manual edit to re-pad. semver-coerced versioning makes the comparison work.

BR_REF in this very renovate.json — points the buildroot-package datasource at the right Buildroot release. Tracks nerves_system_br/main's NERVES_BR_VERSION via the nerves-system-br-buildroot-version custom datasource. Regex only matches digit-dot refs (not `main` or branch names), so it leaves the nerves-system-br-buildroot-version URL alone.
